title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXII. Jingles.
content:
Hey diddle, dinketty, poppety, pet,
        The merchants of London they wear scarlet;
        Silk in the collar, and gold in the hem,
        So merrily march the merchantmen.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXII. Jingles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
